## Title: Fix incorrect slot boundary calculation causing protocol state machine violation

### Summary
The `get_slot_from_timestamp()` function in the PHY initialization layer contains an off-by-one error in its slot boundary detection logic that violates 3GPP timing specifications. The while loop condition uses strict inequality (`>`) instead of inclusive (`>=`) when comparing timestamps against slot boundaries. This causes timestamps that fall exactly on slot boundaries to be assigned to the
